description: A research lab needs a visual search experiment built in PsychoPy Builder for an attention study where participants search for a target letter T among distractor letter L shapes. Each trial must consist of a 500ms fixation cross followed by a search array with set sizes of 4, 8, 12, or 16 items. The target is present on 50% of trials. Participants respond using 'space' for target-present and 'n' for target-absent trials. The experiment must feature a welcome screen, a practice block of 8 trials with accuracy feedback (correct/incorrect), a break screen, a main block driven by a conditions file, and a final thank-you screen. Create the conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/visual_search_conditions.csv with columns 'set_size', 'target_present' (1=present, 0=absent), and 'corrAns' representing all combinations of set sizes and target presence. Save the experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/visual_search_experiment.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123
